## How to test
1. Open OBS -> Add **Browser Source** -> point to the built widget/demo.
2. Verify expected behavior:
- [ ] Loads without console errors
- [ ] Interacts correctly with StreamElements or mock data
- [ ] Styles render as expected (light/dark)
- [ ] Performance is acceptable
3. Cross-check in a regular browser if applicable.

(If visual or UI change)

## Breaking changes
- [ ] No breaking changes
- If breaking, describe migration steps:

## Security / Privacy
- [ ] No new secrets or tokens added
- [ ] Input sanitized and validated
- [ ] No PII or sensitive data introduced

## Accessibility
- [ ] Keyboard accessible
- [ ] ARIA roles/labels applied where needed
- [ ] Color contrast acceptable

## Performance
- [ ] No significant regressions
- Notes (optional benchmark notes):

- [ ] CI/Build/Tooling

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested locally in OBS Browser Source
- [ ] Added/updated docs
- [ ] Added/updated tests (if needed)
- [ ] CI passing (lint/build/tests)
- [ ] Added a Changeset (if user-facing package change)
